a.xlink:title: Constants used by ArkScript.
Includes the needed files to start using ArkScript.
Common code for the compiler.
In charge of welding everything needed to compile code.
State used by the virtual machine: it loads the bytecode, can compile it if needed,...
Keeping track of the internal data needed by the VM.
AST node used by the parser, optimizer and compiler.
Compile the intermediate representation to bytecode.
A bytecode disassembler for ArkScript.
Debugger used by the VM when an error or a breakpoint is reached.
Optimizes a given ArkScript AST.
Parse ArkScript code, but do not handle any import declarations.
The base class for all MacroExecutors.
Executor for Conditional Macros.
Executor for List Macros.
Executor for Symbol Macros.
Defines tools to handle macro definitions.
Handles the macros and their expansion in ArkScript source code.
Resolves names and fully qualify them in the AST (prefixing them with the package they are from)
Handle imports, resolve them with modules and everything.
The basic value type handled by the compiler.
Optimize IR based on IR entity grouped by 2 (or more)
The ArkScript virtual machine.
ArkScript REPL - Read Eval Print Loop.
Helpers for the VM.
Internal object to resolve asynchronously a function call in ArkScript.
